# RATELIMIT-PROBE FIXTURE (synthetic, deterministic)
# target_tokens: 100000
# generator: bin/gsd-t-ratelimit-probe.cjs (T2 fixture builder)
# heuristic: 1 token ≈ 4 chars (English) ±5% tolerance
# seed: 100000 (Mulberry32)
# DO NOT EDIT — re-generate via the probe runner if needed.

# CLAUDE.md (synthetic — ratelimit-probe fixture)

## Prime Directives

1. SIMPLICITY ABOVE ALL.
2. Always check downstream effects.
3. Always update docs alongside code.
4. Work autonomously.

## Tech Stack

Node.js >= 18, zero runtime deps. Tests via node --test. Distribution via npm.

## Conventions

Snake-case files, PascalCase classes, kebab-case CLI flags, schema-versioned outputs.
Decision Log entries on every commit. Pre-Commit Gate is mandatory.


# Synthetic Contract — Probe Fixture v1.0.0

> Status: STABLE. Owner: probe-fixture-generator.

## Schema

```json
{ "schemaVersion": "1.0.0", "generatedAt": "<iso>", "items": [...] }
```

## Producer

The probe-worker emits one NDJSON line per spawn. Fields: workerId, ttftMs, totalMs, status429.

## Consumer

The sweep runner aggregates per-cell, computes p50/p95, declared-safe iff zero 429 and p95 ≤ 8000ms.

## Refresh

Re-run on tier change or every 30 days.
